title: Add clickable category section with uploaded product images

requirements.text: Add the uploaded images (1771838406102.png, 1771838406102-1.png, 1771838406102-2.png, 1771838406102-3.png, 1771838406102-4.png, 1771838406102-5.png, 1771838406102-6.png, 1771838406102-7.png) to the product browsing page positioned below the existing promotional sections
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 uploaded images are displayed on the ProductBrowse page
Images are positioned below the two existing Meesho promotional sections
Images maintain consistent styling with the existing page design

requirements.text: Create a category section where clicking on the first uploaded image (1771838406102.png) reveals the remaining product images (1771838406102-1.png through 1771838406102-7.png) underneath

quotes: I just want catogery under it on clicking on this image comes that products

acceptanceCriteria: The first image (1771838406102.png) acts as a category thumbnail/trigger
Clicking the first image toggles the visibility of the remaining 7 product images
Product images display in a grid layout underneath the clicked category image
The interaction provides visual feedback (hover states, active states)

requirements.text: Render the uploaded product images (1771838406102.png through 1771838406102-7.png) as static assets from frontend/public/assets/uploaded directory
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 uploaded images are accessible from frontend/public/assets/uploaded/
Images load correctly without backend routing
Image paths are properly referenced in the ProductBrowse component

constraints: Do not modify the existing promotional sections with Meesho affiliate links
Maintain the existing category filtering functionality
Keep the interaction pattern simple and intuitive
nonGoals: Adding new products to the backend database
Creating new category types in the backend
Adding affiliate links to these specific images
